description: AI API call detected — verify error handling is in place
remediation: Ensure AI API calls are wrapped in try/except. Handle rate limits, timeouts, and malformed responses. Required by CRA Annex I secure-by-design.
deadline_note: Current law: 2 Aug 2026. Omnibus proposes: 2 Dec 2027 (Annex III). Trilogue in progress.

description: PII or sensitive data flows into or out of LLM without redaction — information disclosure risk
remediation: Scrub PII before sending to model APIs and filter model output before returning to users. Use libraries like presidio, scrubadub, or pii-catcher. OWASP LLM02:2025.
deadline_note: Current law: 2 Aug 2026. Omnibus proposes: 2 Dec 2027 (Annex III). Trilogue in progress.

description: PII or sensitive data flows into or out of LLM without redaction — information disclosure risk
remediation: Scrub PII before sending to model APIs and filter model output before returning to users. Use libraries like presidio, scrubadub, or pii-catcher. OWASP LLM02:2025.
deadline_note: Current law: 2 Aug 2026. Omnibus proposes: 2 Dec 2027 (Annex III). Trilogue in progress.

description: AI API call detected — verify error handling is in place
remediation: Ensure AI API calls are wrapped in try/except. Handle rate limits, timeouts, and malformed responses. Required by CRA Annex I secure-by-design.
deadline_note: Current law: 2 Aug 2026. Omnibus proposes: 2 Dec 2027 (Annex III). Trilogue in progress.

description: System prompt exposed in client code, API response, or logs — prompt leakage risk
remediation: Keep system prompts server-side only. Never return them in API responses or log them. Use prompt references/IDs instead of inline prompt text. OWASP LLM07:2025.
deadline_note: Current law: 2 Aug 2026. Omnibus proposes: 2 Dec 2027 (Annex III). Trilogue in progress.

description: Possible API key or token in assignment in AI system code. Article 15 requires cybersecurity measures for high-risk systems. Fix: Move credentials to environment variables or a secrets manager.
deadline_note: Article 15 cybersecurity requirements. Current law: 2 Aug 2026.

description: System prompt exposed in client code, API response, or logs — prompt leakage risk
remediation: Keep system prompts server-side only. Never return them in API responses or log them. Use prompt references/IDs instead of inline prompt text. OWASP LLM07:2025.
deadline_note: Current law: 2 Aug 2026. Omnibus proposes: 2 Dec 2027 (Annex III). Trilogue in progress.

description: Safety components under Union harmonisation legislation

observations.observation: Automated decision function detected — Article 13 requires transparency to deployers about capabilities and limitations.

deadline_note: Current law: 2 Aug 2026. Omnibus proposes: 2 Aug 2028 (Annex I / sectoral). Trilogue in progress.

description: Unsafe model deserialization — arbitrary code execution risk
remediation: Use safetensors format or torch.load(path, weights_only=True). Never unpickle untrusted model files.
deadline_note: Current law: 2 Aug 2026. Omnibus proposes: 2 Dec 2027 (Annex III). Trilogue in progress.

description: System prompt exposed in client code, API response, or logs — prompt leakage risk
remediation: Keep system prompts server-side only. Never return them in API responses or log them. Use prompt references/IDs instead of inline prompt text. OWASP LLM07:2025.
deadline_note: Current law: 2 Aug 2026. Omnibus proposes: 2 Dec 2027 (Annex III). Trilogue in progress.

description: High temperature setting (>=1.0) — review whether hallucination risk is acceptable for this use case
remediation: Use temperature=0 or 0.1 for factual/production tasks. Reserve high temperature for creative tasks.
deadline_note: Current law: 2 Aug 2026. Omnibus proposes: 2 Dec 2027 (Annex III). Trilogue in progress.

description: System prompt exposed in client code, API response, or logs — prompt leakage risk
remediation: Keep system prompts server-side only. Never return them in API responses or log them. Use prompt references/IDs instead of inline prompt text. OWASP LLM07:2025.
deadline_note: Current law: 2 Aug 2026. Omnibus proposes: 2 Dec 2027 (Annex III). Trilogue in progress.

description: PII or sensitive data flows into or out of LLM without redaction — information disclosure risk
remediation: Scrub PII before sending to model APIs and filter model output before returning to users. Use libraries like presidio, scrubadub, or pii-catcher. OWASP LLM02:2025.
deadline_note: Current law: 2 Aug 2026. Omnibus proposes: 2 Dec 2027 (Annex III). Trilogue in progress.

description: LLM output used as factual information without grounding or verification — misinformation risk
remediation: Implement retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) for factual tasks. Require citations and source attribution. Add fact-checking or grounding verification before presenting LLM output as fact. OWASP LLM09:2025.
deadline_note: Current law: 2 Aug 2026. Omnibus proposes: 2 Dec 2027 (Annex III). Trilogue in progress.

description: Unbounded token generation — cost and resource exhaustion risk
remediation: Set explicit max_tokens limit. Add cost monitoring and rate limiting.
deadline_note: Current law: 2 Aug 2026. Omnibus proposes: 2 Dec 2027 (Annex III). Trilogue in progress.

description: High temperature setting (>=1.0) — review whether hallucination risk is acceptable for this use case
remediation: Use temperature=0 or 0.1 for factual/production tasks. Reserve high temperature for creative tasks.
deadline_note: Current law: 2 Aug 2026. Omnibus proposes: 2 Dec 2027 (Annex III). Trilogue in progress.

description: AI API call detected — verify error handling is in place
remediation: Ensure AI API calls are wrapped in try/except. Handle rate limits, timeouts, and malformed responses. Required by CRA Annex I secure-by-design.
deadline_note: Current law: 2 Aug 2026. Omnibus proposes: 2 Dec 2027 (Annex III). Trilogue in progress.

deadline_note: Current law: 2 Aug 2026. Omnibus proposes: 2 Dec 2027 (Annex III). Trilogue in progress.

description: AWS access key ID detected in AI system code. Article 15 requires cybersecurity measures for high-risk systems. Fix: Use AWS credential provider chain or environment variables.
deadline_note: Article 15 cybersecurity requirements. Current law: 2 Aug 2026.

description: Possible AWS secret access key in AI system code. Article 15 requires cybersecurity measures for high-risk systems. Fix: Use AWS credential provider chain or environment variables.
deadline_note: Article 15 cybersecurity requirements. Current law: 2 Aug 2026.

observations.observation: No logging detected — Article 12 requires automatic recording of events for traceability.

RAG (retrieval-augmented generation) pipeline detected — external data is injected at inference time. Article 10 data governance requirements apply to retrieved data, not only training data. Consider: data source provenance, freshness, access controls, and bias in the retrieval corpus.
